setupGuide.notes: Placeholder for Bahrain International Circuit, Endurance Circuit — 49 laps / 308.4 km reproduced as 70 laps of Jerez GP2019. The 2010 Bahrain GP used Sakhir's Endurance Circuit, which is not in AMS2.
Placeholder for Albert Park Grand Prix Circuit — 58 laps / 307.6 km reproduced as 96 laps of Adelaide Modern. Albert Park is not in AMS2.
Placeholder for Sepang International Circuit — 56 laps / 310.4 km reproduced as 70 laps of CurveloLong. Sepang is not in AMS2.
Placeholder for Shanghai International Circuit — 56 laps / 305.1 km reproduced as 71 laps of Spielberg Modern. Shanghai International Circuit is not in AMS2.
Placeholder for Istanbul Park — 58 laps / 309.4 km reproduced as 60 laps of Nurb GP 2020. Istanbul Park is not in AMS2.
Placeholder for Valencia Street Circuit — 57 laps / 308.9 km reproduced as 98 laps of Long Beach. Valencia Street Circuit is not in AMS2.
Placeholder for Marina Bay Street Circuit — 61 laps / 309.3 km reproduced as 114 laps of Salvador Street Circuit. Marina Bay Street Circuit is not in AMS2.
Suzuka appears in AMS2 as Kansai; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
Placeholder for Korea International Circuit — 55 laps / 308.6 km reproduced as 64 laps of Termas Rio Hondo. Korea International Circuit is not in AMS2.
Placeholder for Yas Marina Circuit — 55 laps / 305.4 km reproduced as 62 laps of Imola GP 2018. Yas Marina Circuit is not in AMS2.
